title: The Grand Line at Last
description: On pages 1–4, the grand line at last as the Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it.
scene: The Grand Line at Last. The Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The greatest sea in the world...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hm? Did you hear something just now?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be surprised if that's just noise from the wind. The terrain here is quite odd after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nami! There's a mountain up ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That can't be! Once we pass the twin capes up ahead, we should reach the open sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you kidding!? How the heck are we supposed to fight something that big!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're too close to see anything! It looks like just a giant wall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maybe the whale just hasn't noticed us yet!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well if we don't do anything soon, we're gonna crash!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's an open space up left!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well we've gotta do something! I'll come help too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's it! I've got a plan!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the grand line at last. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
